alt_text: A photograph of the Helix Nebula (NGC 7293), often called the 'Eye of God' — a planetary nebula appearing as a glowing blue and orange ring against a star-filled black background.
notes: Decorative cosmic photograph; no text labels. Used illustratively in a chapter on the formation of the world of coming-to-be and passing-away, evoking the cosmic/divine scale of the discussion.
